---
title: ""
toc: false
link-external-newwindow: true
---

````{=html}
<div id="content-overlay">
<div class="content-panel">
<h2 class="cv-title">Curriculum Vitae</h2>
<div class="cv-cards">
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h3>Academic CV</h3>
    <div class="cv-card-actions">
      <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="files/cv/Erol_Academic_CV.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View</a>
      <a class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" href="files/cv/Erol_Academic_CV.pdf" download>Download</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h3>Industry CV</h3>
    <div class="cv-card-actions">
      <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="files/cv/Erol_Industry_CV.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View</a>
      <a class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" href="files/cv/Erol_Industry_CV.pdf" download>Download</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<p class="cv-aside">Here to recruit me? The two CVs above have you covered. Just passing through? Then please enjoy some professionally relevant procrastination: the <em>Friends</em> cast braving the job hunt. My actual work, after all, is more or less Chandler&rsquo;s &ldquo;data reconfiguration and statistical factoring.&rdquo; <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3j2OlOrxEPE" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Watch the clip &#9654;</a></p>
</div>
</div>
````

<span id="particles-js"></span>

<script src="js/particles.js"></script>
<script src="js/app.js"></script>

<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-C9REN6Q65E"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-C9REN6Q65E');
</script>
